g.text: yet every provider shares one true rate:

text.style: font-style: italic; font-size: 9.5px; font-family: 'Palatino', 'Palatino Linotype', 'Book Antiqua', 'Georgia', 'DejaVu Serif', serif; fill: #0a5c54
font-style: italic; font-size: 8.5px; font-family: 'Palatino', 'Palatino Linotype', 'Book Antiqua', 'Georgia', 'DejaVu Serif', serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #6a6a6a

g.text: 300 simulated providers, shared true rate p0 = 3%, caseloads lognormal (median 30). Limits = p0 +/- z*sqrt(p0(1-p0)/n). Illustrative simulation, not real provider data.

text.style: font-size: 12.5px; font-family: 'Palatino', 'Palatino Linotype', 'Book Antiqua', 'Georgia', 'DejaVu Serif', serif; text-anchor: middle; fill: #111111

g.text: With no real differences, ranking still manufactures outliers
